name: FeiyuTech Scorp F2 Gimbal Stabilizer
description: From assembly space to payload performance and interactive control,It is specially built for Sony A7 series,and compatible with mirrorless and DSLR cameras in various sizes.

features.Key Features:: Max payload updates to 2.5 kg, easily work with popular mirrorless cameras. | 3 Axis motor-lock design to get a convenient balance and storage. | Integrated hanging handle which can switch among different angle to use in more different shooting scenes. | Touch screen operation without APP to directly set up parameters and change follow mode. | Center of gravity memory slider make balancing easier. | No tripod required, the gimbal comes with a folding aileron bracket.
features.What's in the box?: Main body of stabilizer | Data cable USB 2.0 to Type-C | Data cable Type-C to Micro (A03) | Data cable Type-C to Type-C (C02) | Data cable Type-C to TRS2.5 (T02) | Sony cable release Type-C to Multi | Panasonic cable release (DC2.5mm) Type-C to 2.5mm*1, | Quick release plate | Heightening block | Lens holder | Lens holder fixing knob | Camera fixing screw | Storage box | Tripod
